bullets: Leading end-to-end web and mobile development using React, Next.js, React Native, and Node.js.
Working with both MongoDB and SQL databases to design scalable backend systems.
Mentoring developers, conducting code reviews, and guiding architectural and technical decisions with stakeholders.
Developed high-performance web and mobile applications using React, Next.js, and React Native (Expo).
Built scalable RESTful APIs and backend services using Node.js.
Managed and optimized both MongoDB and SQL databases for production applications.
Explained data structures and algorithms using practical, real-world examples.
Assisted students in debugging code, error analysis, and problem-solving techniques.
Supported academic understanding of core computer science concepts.
Built full-stack web applications using modern JavaScript technologies.
Performed large-scale data extraction and web scraping tasks.
Collaborated using Git and GitHub to ensure code quality and version control.
